intentSynonyms: reblog a post to your tumblr blog, optionally adding a comment in tumblr
description: Reblog a post to your Tumblr blog, optionally adding a comment.

blog_name.description: Your blog name to reblog to

parent_blog_name.description: Source blog name where the post originated

parent_post_id.description: Post ID of the original post to reblog

reblog_key.description: Reblog key for the post (from post data)

comment.description: Optional text comment to add to the reblog
